case_title: CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. MERCEDES A VIGIL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT VIGIL, MERCEDES A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT VIGIL, MERCEDES A
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIGIL, MERCEDES A $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
